train.instruction:
<image>
You are a phone-use AI agent. Now your task is "在淘宝App中将价格最低的迷你折叠伞加入购物车".
Your action history is:
1. {"reasoning": "为了在淘宝App中将价格最低的迷你折叠伞加入购物车，首先需要进入搜索框输入商品名称，点击位于页面顶部的搜索框", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于页面顶部的搜索框"}}
2. {"reasoning": "已经进入搜索页面，现在需要输入商品名称“迷你折叠伞”", "action": "input", "parameters": {"text": "迷你折叠伞"}}
3. {"reasoning": "已经输入了商品名称，现在需要点击搜索按钮进行搜索", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "搜索框右侧的“搜索”按钮"}}
4. {"reasoning": "搜索结果已经展示出来，为了找到价格最低的，需要点击综合排序按钮，选择价格从低到高", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "综合排序按钮"}}
5. {"reasoning": "在弹出的排序选项中选择价格从低到高", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "价格从低到高"}}
6. {"reasoning": "选择价格从低到高后，出现的第一个商品价格最低，点击此商品进入商品详情页", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "商品列表中第一个价格最低的伞"}}
7. {"reasoning": "进入商品详情页后，点击加入购物车按钮", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于屏幕底部的“加入购物车”按钮"}}
Please provide the next action based on the screenshot and your action history. You should do careful reasoning before providing the action.
Your action space includes:
- Name: click, Parameters: target_element (a high-level description of the UI element to click).
- Name: swipe, Parameters: direction (one of UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT).
- Name: input, Parameters: text (the text to input).
- Name: wait, Parameters: (no parameters, will wait for 1 second).
- Name: done, Parameters: (no parameters).
Your output should be a JSON object with the following format:
{"reasoning": "Your reasoning here", "action": "The next action (one of click, input, swipe, wait, done)", "parameters": {"param1": "value1", ...}}

gt_action.target_element: 弹窗底部的“加入购物车”按钮
